name: status-line
note: CC status-line (CRITICAL sample): Row + intrinsic + grow main-axis behavior. 4-dim approximation of real CC right-align (which uses justify-content, out of spike scope ❌-2). status carry-over for spec-1.1.

sources.note: CC uses justifyContent space-between for status-like two-sided rows
CC uses width=100% and justifyContent/overflow rows for right-side status metadata

artifact: manual 4-dim approximation; real right-align/justifyContent is explicitly carried to spec-1.1
